input.background: We've established that heights of 10-year-old boys vary according to a Normal distribution with μ=138 centimeters and σ=7 centimeters.
input.question: What proportion is between 150 and 140 centimeters?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
output.answer: The proportion of the population between 150 and 140 centimeters tall is 0.3423.

height.description: The height of 10-year-old boys, which follows a Normal distribution.

mean_height.description: The mean height of 10-year-old boys according to the Normal distribution.

std_dev_height.description: The standard deviation of the height of 10-year-old boys according to the Normal distribution.

lower_bound.description: The lower bound of the height range to calculate the proportion.

upper_bound.description: The upper bound of the height range to calculate the proportion.
